title: Chopper Protects the Merry
description: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Chopper, Gedatsu, Gan Fall, Luffy, Nami. Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: GOD!?... Aya... who cares about God!?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Are they worth more than money!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's the place for our next trial

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There will be more priests. Be careful!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What...? One trial is enough, damn it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's just an average looking plain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Those are human skills on those poles!

summary: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
